public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as weather caller.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a weather caller still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of weather caller in and around Meadow of Lyra, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Meadow of Lyra workable through the obligations of weather caller while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must stay useful at the seam where policy becomes ordinary consequence. Around Meadow of Lyra, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of weather caller visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Tavian DawnsilkMead needs help with a problem in Meadow of Lyra that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Tavian DawnsilkMead can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tavian DawnsilkMead carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Meadow of Lyra: the part of Meadow of Lyra where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
